name: CM_LIST_SCROLL_VIEW2COL
description: Two-column vertical list view using VerticalListItem2nd components. Similar scrolling behavior to VerticalListView but with label/value column layout. Item height 68px, viewport 190px. Keyboard navigation and auto-scroll.
visualForm: Scrollable two-column list (320x190px) with items showing label | value pairs in 68px rows
descriptionKo: VerticalListItem2nd 컴포넌트를 사용하는 2열 세로 리스트 뷰입니다. VerticalListView와 동일한 스크롤 동작에 레이블/값 열 레이아웃을 추가합니다.
descriptionEn: Two-column vertical list view using VerticalListItem2nd components. Similar scrolling behavior to VerticalListView but with label/value column layout. Item height 68px, viewport 190px. Keyboard navigation and auto-scroll.
